name: Three Citrus Chicken Marinade
recipeIngredient: Your choice of skinned chicken parts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a shallow wide mixing bowl.
2. Add the chicken and marinate for 1-2 hours.
3. Grill or broil, brushing the marinade on the chicken 2-3 times.
4. The marinade may also be used on salmon, tuna, or shrimp. Reduce the marinating time so that the citrus does not "cook" the seafood.
